title: Glowy Nether Portals
description: Gives nether portals of any size a bright border all around, while keeping the vanilla look.
body:
![Standard size portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52af61a848645465701776644852fcb6467f1b3f.png)
# Glowy Nether Portals
This resourcepacks gives portals of any size (even ones spawned in using commands) a bright border around them. 

This pack should work on any version above **1.8.9** up to the most recent as long as you use Optifine or Continuity

I publish all of my resourcepacks for **free**, and ad revenue is usually around 3$ per month from all of them combined, so any donations are very appreciated.

[![A pixelart of the word "donate"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ff631c976bd58fbb443ae89158499badb2a6b7.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=B75MGYUT2UCDC)

### If you want to report a bug or have a suggestion, you can message me on discord @aspoleczne
